task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Onboarding Tracker** (Level 8)

Build a customer onboarding tracker. Two tables: Customers (name, company, status) and OnboardingSteps (customer_id, step_name, completed). Steps belong to Customers. Need: full CRUD on customers (auth required on mutations), full CRUD on steps (auth required on mutations), GET /api/customers/onboarding to filter by status='onboarding'.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a Customers table:
  name,
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
database is local memory

owner is 'user@example.com'
allow signup and login

create a Customers table:
  name, required
  company, required
  status, default 'onboarding'

create a OnboardingSteps table:
  customer_id, required
  step_name, required
  completed, default false

when user calls POST /api/customers sending customer:
  requires login
  validate customer:
    name is text, required
    company is text, required
  saved = save customer to Customers
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/customers:
  customers = get all Customers
  send back customers

when user calls GET /api/customers/:id:
  customer = get Customer with this id
  send back customer

when user calls PUT /api/customers/:id sending updates:
  requires login
  updated = save updates to Customer with this id
  send back updated

when user calls GET /api/customers/onboarding:
  onboarding = get every Customers where status is 'onboarding'
  remove Customer with this id
  send back 'ok' with status 204

when user calls GET /api/customers/onboarding:
  onboarding = get all Customers where status is 'onboarding'
  send back onboarding

when user calls POST /api/steps sending step:
  requires login
  validate step:
    customer_id is number, required
    step_name is text, required
  saved = save step to OnboardingSteps
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/steps:
  steps = get all OnboardingSteps
  send back steps

when user calls GET /api/steps/:id:
  step = get OnboardingStep with this id
  send back step

when user calls PUT /api/steps/:id sending updates:
  requires login
  updated = save updates to OnboardingStep with this id
  send back updated

when user calls DELETE /api/steps/:id:
  requires login
  remove OnboardingStep with this id
  send back 'ok' with status 204

page 'App' at '/':
  requires login
  name_input = ''
  company_input = ''
  
  section 'Add Customer' with style app_card:
    'Customer Name' is a text input saved as name_input
    'Company' is a text input saved as company_input
    button 'Add Customer':
      send { name: name_input, company: company_input } as a new record to '/api/customers'
      set name_input to ''
      set company_input to ''
  
  on page load get customers from '/api/customers'
  
  section 'Customers' with style app_card:
    display customers as table
  
  on page load get steps from '/api/steps'
  
  section 'Onboarding Steps' with style app_card:
    display steps as table
